message:
perf(audit,trauma): optimize batch operations

Audit improvements:
- Move rulesList string generation outside the session processing loop
- Previously regenerated identical string for every session in batch
- Now computed once since active bullets don't change during scan

Trauma batch saving:
- Add new saveTraumas() function for efficient multi-entry persistence
- Groups entries by target file path to minimize lock acquisitions
- Single appendFile call per file instead of per-entry
- Uses withLock for each batch to maintain atomicity

Trauma import command:
- Refactor to collect entries first, then batch save
- Previously called saveTrauma() in a loop (N file operations)
- Now single saveTraumas() call (1 file operation per unique path)
- Significant speedup for large imports

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
